revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:List navbox]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:List navbox]]</includeonly>

{{Navbox | name = List navbox | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | title = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists in Wikipedia]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Style | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists of works|Lists of works]] * [[Wikipedia:Stand-alone lists#Style|Stand-alone lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Set index articles|Set index articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Naming conventions (lists)|Naming conventions (lists)]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility#Lists|Accessibility/Lists]]
| group2 = Content | list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured list criteria|Featured list criteria]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists|WikiProject Lists]]
| group3 = Guideline | list3 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories, lists, and navigation templates|Categories, lists, and navigation templates]]
|group4 = Essays |list4 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories versus lists|Categories vs. lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists in Wikipedia|Lists in Wikipedia]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists within articles|Lists within articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Listcruft|Listcruft]] * [[Wikipedia:Write the article first|Write the article first]] * [[Wikipedia:Pro and con lists|Pro and con lists]] * [[Wikipedia:List dos and don'ts|List dos and don'ts]] (information page)
| group5 = Existing lists | list5 = * [[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/List of|List of lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/Lists of|Lists of lists]] * [[List of lists of lists]]
| group6 = Templates | list6 = * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Lists|Template index/Lists]] * [[:Category:List templates]]
| group7 = Assistance | list7 = * [[Help:List]]
}}<noinclude> {{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}}
[[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal navigational templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia style templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia lists|τ]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text:

}}<noinclude> {{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}}
[[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal navigational templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia style templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia lists|τ]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = List navbox | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | title = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists in Wikipedia]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Style | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists of works|Lists of works]] * [[Wikipedia:Stand-alone lists#Style|Stand-alone lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Set index articles|Set index articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Naming conventions (lists)|Naming conventions (lists)]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility#Lists|Accessibility/Lists]]

|group4 = Essays |list4 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories versus lists|Categories vs. lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists in Wikipedia|Lists in Wikipedia]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists within articles|Lists within articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Listcruft|Listcruft]] * [[Wikipedia:Write the article first|Write the article first]] * [[Wikipedia:Pro and con lists|Pro and con lists]] * [[Wikipedia:List dos and don'ts|List dos and don'ts]] (information page)
| group5 = Existing lists | list5 = * [[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/List of|List of lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/Lists of|Lists of lists]] * [[:en:List of lists of lists|List of lists of lists]]

| group7 = Assistance | list7 = * [[Help:List]]
}}<noinclude> {{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}}

[[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia lists|τ]] [[sn:List navbox]][[sn:ist navbox]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = List navbox | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | title = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists in Wikipedia]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Style | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists of works|Lists of works]] * [[Wikipedia:Stand-alone lists#Style|Stand-alone lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Set index articles|Set index articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Naming conventions (lists)|Naming conventions (lists)]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility#Lists|Accessibility/Lists]]
| group2 = Content | list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured list criteria|Featured list criteria]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists|WikiProject Lists]]
| group3 = Guideline | list3 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories, lists, and navigation templates|Categories, lists, and navigation templates]]
|group4 = Essays |list4 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories versus lists|Categories vs. lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists in Wikipedia|Lists in Wikipedia]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists within articles|Lists within articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Listcruft|Listcruft]] * [[Wikipedia:Write the article first|Write the article first]] * [[Wikipedia:Pro and con lists|Pro and con lists]] * [[Wikipedia:List dos and don'ts|List dos and don'ts]] (information page)
| group5 = Existing lists | list5 = * [[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/List of|List of lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/Lists of|Lists of lists]] * [[:en:List of lists of lists|List of lists of lists]]
| group6 = Templates | list6 = * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Lists|Template index/Lists]] * [[:Category:List templates]]
| group7 = Assistance | list7 = * [[Help:List]]
}}<noinclude> {{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}}
[[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal navigational templates]]
[[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia lists|τ]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTList navbox]][[Category:sn_crud|TESTist navbox]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = List navbox | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | title = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists in Wikipedia]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Style | list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists of works|Lists of works]] * [[Wikipedia:Stand-alone lists#Style|Stand-alone lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Set index articles|Set index articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Naming conventions (lists)|Naming conventions (lists)]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility#Lists|Accessibility/Lists]]
| group2 = Content | list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Contents/Lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Featured list criteria|Featured list criteria]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Lists|WikiProject Lists]]
| group3 = Guideline | list3 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories, lists, and navigation templates|Categories, lists, and navigation templates]]
|group4 = Essays |list4 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories versus lists|Categories vs. lists]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists in Wikipedia|Lists in Wikipedia]] * [[Wikipedia:Lists within articles|Lists within articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Listcruft|Listcruft]] * [[Wikipedia:Write the article first|Write the article first]] * [[Wikipedia:Pro and con lists|Pro and con lists]] * [[Wikipedia:List dos and don'ts|List dos and don'ts]] (information page)
| group5 = Existing lists | list5 = * [[Wikipedia:Featured lists|Featured lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/List of|List of lists]] * [[Special:Allpages/Lists of|Lists of lists]] * [[:en:List of lists of lists|List of lists of lists]]
| group6 = Templates | list6 = * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Lists|Template index/Lists]] * [[:Category:List templates]]
| group7 = Assistance | list7 = * [[Help:List]]
}}<noinclude> {{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}}
